# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /u/cmusolino/grace-pvt/buil-dbg
# It was generated by CMake: /mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/x86_64/cmake/4.0/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Debug

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:STRING=/u/cmusolino/grace-libs/install/kokkos/bin/nvcc_wrapper

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/x86_64/gcc/15.1.0/bin/gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/x86_64/gcc/15.1.0/bin/gcc-ranlib

CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cc

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-7

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-7

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/u/cmusolino/grace-pvt/buil-dbg/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/usr/local

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ld

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Catch2.
Catch2_DIR:PATH=/u/cmusolino/grace-libs/install/catch2/lib64/cmake/Catch2

//Value Computed by CMake
GRACE_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/u/cmusolino/grace-pvt/buil-dbg

//Build the docs
GRACE_BUILD_DOCS:BOOL=OFF

//Only build docs
GRACE_BUILD_DOCS_ONLY:BOOL=OFF

//Build the code with cartesian coordinates
GRACE_CARTESIAN_COORDINATES:BOOL=ON

//Build the benchmarks
GRACE_ENABLE_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Burgers equation module
GRACE_ENABLE_BURGERS:BOOL=OFF

//Use Cowling approximation (default)
GRACE_ENABLE_COWLING_METRIC:BOOL=ON

//Enable CUDA device support
GRACE_ENABLE_CUDA:BOOL=ON

//Enable GRMHD equation module
GRACE_ENABLE_GRMHD:BOOL=ON

//Enable HIP device support
GRACE_ENABLE_HIP:BOOL=OFF

//Lorene support
GRACE_ENABLE_LORENE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable M1 rad transport
GRACE_ENABLE_M1:BOOL=OFF

//Enable OpenMP threading support
GRACE_ENABLE_OMP:BOOL=OFF

//Build profiling hooks
GRACE_ENABLE_PROFILING:BOOL=OFF

//Enable scalar advection equation module
GRACE_ENABLE_SCALAR_ADV:BOOL=OFF

//Enable serial execution of ParallelLoops
GRACE_ENABLE_SERIAL:BOOL=OFF

//Build the tests
GRACE_ENABLE_TESTING:BOOL=ON

//TwoPunctures support
GRACE_ENABLE_TWO_PUNCTURES:BOOL=OFF

//Enable VTK support
GRACE_ENABLE_VTK:BOOL=OFF

//Use full Z4c evolution
GRACE_ENABLE_Z4C_METRIC:BOOL=ON

//Freeze hydrodynamics evolution
GRACE_FREEZE_HYDRO:BOOL=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
GRACE_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
GRACE_NSPACEDIM:UNINITIALIZED=3

//Value Computed by CMake
GRACE_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/u/cmusolino/grace-pvt

//Build the code with spherical coordinates
GRACE_SPHERICAL_COORDINATES:BOOL=OFF

//HDF5 C Wrapper compiler.  Used only to detect HDF5 compile flags.
HDF5_C_COMPILER_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/hdf5/gcc_15-15.1.0-openmpi_5.0-5.0.9/1.12.2/bin/h5pcc

//Path to a library.
HDF5_C_LIBRARY_dl:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libdl.a

//Path to a library.
HDF5_C_LIBRARY_hdf5:FILEPATH=/mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/hdf5/gcc_15-15.1.0-openmpi_5.0-5.0.9/1.12.2/lib/libhdf5.so

//Path to a library.
HDF5_C_LIBRARY_m:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libm.so

//Path to a library.
HDF5_C_LIBRARY_z:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libz.so

//HDF5 file differencing tool.
HDF5_DIFF_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/hdf5/gcc_15-15.1.0-openmpi_5.0-5.0.9/1.12.2/bin/h5diff

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for HDF5.
HDF5_DIR:PATH=HDF5_DIR-NOTFOUND

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Kokkos.
Kokkos_DIR:PATH=/u/cmusolino/grace-libs/install/kokkos/lib64/cmake/Kokkos

//Path to a file.
LIBXML2_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include/libxml2

//Path to a library.
LIBXML2_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libxml2.so

//Path to a program.
LIBXML2_XMLLINT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/xmllint

//Executable for running MPI programs.
MPIEXEC_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/bin/mpiexec

//Maximum number of processors available to run MPI applications.
MPIEXEC_MAX_NUMPROCS:STRING=72

//Flag used by MPI to specify the number of processes for mpiexec;
// the next option will be the number of processes.
MPIEXEC_NUMPROC_FLAG:STRING=-n

//These flags will be placed after all flags passed to mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_POSTFLAGS:STRING=

//These flags will be directly before the executable that is being
// run by mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_PREFLAGS:STRING=

//MPI CXX additional include directories
MPI_CXX_ADDITIONAL_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//MPI compiler for CXX
MPI_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/bin/mpicxx

//MPI CXX compiler wrapper include directories
MPI_CXX_COMPILER_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=/raven/u/system/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/include;/raven/u/system/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/include/openmpi

//MPI CXX compilation definitions
MPI_CXX_COMPILE_DEFINITIONS:STRING=

//MPI CXX compilation options
MPI_CXX_COMPILE_OPTIONS:STRING=-pthread

//Path to a file.
MPI_CXX_HEADER_DIR:PATH=/raven/u/system/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/include

//MPI CXX libraries to link against
MPI_CXX_LIB_NAMES:STRING=mpi

//MPI CXX linker flags
MPI_CXX_LINK_FLAGS:STRING=-Wl,-rpath -Wl,/mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -pthread

//If true, the MPI-2 C++ bindings are disabled using definitions.
MPI_CXX_SKIP_MPICXX:BOOL=OFF

//MPI C additional include directories
MPI_C_ADDITIONAL_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//MPI compiler for C
MPI_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/bin/mpicc

//MPI C compiler wrapper include directories
MPI_C_COMPILER_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=/raven/u/system/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/include;/raven/u/system/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/include/openmpi

//MPI C compilation definitions
MPI_C_COMPILE_DEFINITIONS:STRING=

//MPI C compilation options
MPI_C_COMPILE_OPTIONS:STRING=-pthread

//Path to a file.
MPI_C_HEADER_DIR:PATH=/raven/u/system/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/include

//MPI C libraries to link against
MPI_C_LIB_NAMES:STRING=mpi

//MPI C linker flags
MPI_C_LINK_FLAGS:STRING=-Wl,-rpath -Wl,/mpcdf/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -pthread

//Location of the mpi library for MPI
MPI_mpi_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/raven/u/system/soft/SLE_15/packages/skylake/openmpi_gpu/cuda_13.0-13.0.1-gcc_15-15.1.0/5.0.9/lib/libmpi.so

//CXX compiler flags for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=-fopenmp

//CXX compiler libraries for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_CXX_LIB_NAMES:STRING=gomp

//C compiler flags for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_C_FLAGS:STRING=-fopenmp

//C compiler libraries for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_C_LIB_NAMES:STRING=gomp;pthread

//Path to the gomp library for OpenMP
OpenMP_gomp_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/gcc/x86_64-suse-linux/7/libgomp.so

//Path to the pthread library for OpenMP
OpenMP_pthread_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libpthread.a

//Arguments to supply to pkg-config
PKG_CONFIG_ARGN:STRING=

//pkg-config executable
PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/pkg-config

//Path to a file.
ZLIB_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Path to a library.
ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
ZLIB_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libz.so

//Path to a file.
p4est_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/u/cmusolino/grace-libs/install/p4est/include

//Path to a library.
p4est_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/u/cmusolino/grace-libs/install/p4est/lib64/libp4est.a

//Path to a library.
pkgcfg_lib_PC_LIBXML_xml2:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libxml2.so

//Path to a library.
sc_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/u/cmusolino/grace-libs/install/p4est/lib64/libsc.a

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for spdlog.
spdlog_DIR:PATH=/u/cmusolino/grace-libs/install/spdlog/lib64/cmake/spdlog

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################
